recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: A Woman as a Friend
recommendations.overview: Francesco and Claudia are best friends. They're inseparable and tell each other everything, until another man enters the picture stealing Claudia's heart. Francesco then realizes that friendship between man and woman is a complicated thing.

recommendations.title: Harriet the Spy
recommendations.overview: When the secret notebook of a young girl who fancies herself a spy is found by her friends, her speculations make her very unpopular! Can she win her friends back?

recommendations.title: Toni Erdmann
recommendations.overview: Convinced that his daughter has forgotten how to laugh, a father shows up unannounced while she's living abroad and bombards her with outrageous jokes.

recommendations.title: Going Overboard
recommendations.overview: A struggling young comedian takes a menial job on a cruise ship where he hopes for his big chance to make it in the world of cruise ship comedy.

recommendations.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
recommendations.overview: Fran likes to think about dying. It brings sensation to her quiet life. When she makes the new guy at work laugh, it leads to more: a date, a slice of pie, a conversation, a spark. The only thing standing in their way is Fran herself.

recommendations.title: Hannah Gadsby: Nanette
recommendations.overview: The Australian comedian Hannah Gadsby is taking an anti-comedy stance in her newest special.

recommendations.title: London
recommendations.overview: London is a drug laden adventure that centers on a party in a New York loft where a young man is trying to win back his ex-girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Return of the Killer Tomatoes!
recommendations.overview: Crazy old Professor Gangreen has developed a way to make tomatoes look human for a second invasion.

recommendations.title: Christmas Vacation '95
recommendations.overview: Two Italians are on holiday in Aspen in Colorado. The first one is Lorenzo whose daughter is crazy about Luke Perry (Beverly Hills 90210 actor) and wants to meet him at all costs. The second one wants to win back his wife who has left him because of
